Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Laurence R. Phillips for plaintiff and moving party Affholder, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Affholder, Inc's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted in part and denied in part.
interrogatories
5 - 11: The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order.
17.1: Denied. The separate statement of matters in dispute does not comply with Rule 335

request for production
1 - 6: The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log.

The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
